description: Determines the properties of the creature's telepathic ability.

descriptionTranslations.en: Determines the properties of the creature's telepathic ability.

entries.description: The telepath can only transmit feelings.

descriptionTranslations.en: The telepath can only transmit feelings.

entries.description: The telepath can transmit full speech.

descriptionTranslations.en: The telepath can transmit full speech.

entries.description: The telepath can transmit images and full memories.

descriptionTranslations.en: The telepath can transmit images and full memories.

entries.description: The range is close, within a few dozen yards.

descriptionTranslations.en: The range is close, within a few dozen yards.

entries.description: The range is wide, a mile or more.

descriptionTranslations.en: The range is wide, a mile or more.

entries.description: The telepath can only send and not receive.

descriptionTranslations.en: The telepath can only send and not receive.

entries.description: The telepath can send and receive similar information back from a target.

descriptionTranslations.en: The telepath can send and receive similar information back from a target.

entries.description: The telepath can only contact one mind at a time.

descriptionTranslations.en: The telepath can only contact one mind at a time.

entries.description: The telepath can contact multiple minds at once.

descriptionTranslations.en: The telepath can contact multiple minds at once.

entries.description: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.

descriptionTranslations.en: Roll twice on this table. If you get a duplicate result, ignore it and roll again. If you get a contradictory result, take the two results and use the one that seems most appropriate.
